title: narcissus bulbocodium var. graellsii
intro: Narcissus bulbocodium var. graellsii, also known as the Hoop Petticoat Daffodil, is a species of flowering plant in the Amaryllidaceae family. The plant is traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly its ability to treat respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and coughs, due to its expectorant and anti-inflammatory properties. The bulbs of the Narcissus bulbocodium var. graellsii plant are also believed to possess health benefits, including reducing inflammation and fighting off infections. The plant's herbal preparations, often in the form of tinctures or infusions, can be used to treat various ailments, although it is essential to consult with a healthcare professional before using any herbal remedies.
